<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Inspect current state and segmentation
print("Level:", current_frame.level)
print("Step:", current_frame.step)
print("Valid actions:", valid_actions)
print("State:", last_action_result.get('state'))
print("game_over:", last_action_result.get('game_over'))
print("level_completed:", last_action_result.get('level_completed'))

# Get key object info
seg = current_frame.segmentation
for node in seg['nodes']:
    if node['id'] in [0, 1, 2, 16, 62]:
        print("Node %d: color=%s, pixels=%d" % (node['id'], node['color'], node['pixels'], node['boundary']))

# Find the blue circle (node 1)
blue_node = next(n for n in seg['nodes'] if n['id'] == 1)
print("Blue circle boundary:", blue_node['boundary'])

# Find yellow objects
yellow_nodes = [n for n in seg['nodes'] if n['color'] == 'Y']
print("Yellow nodes:")
for yn in yellow_nodes:
    print("  Node %d: pixels=%d, boundary=%s" % (yn['id'], yn['pixels'], yn['boundary'])

# Find white area
white_node = next(n for n in seg['nodes'] if n['color'] == 'W')
print("White area boundary:", white_node['boundary'])
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
